name: Skylark Indoor Golf Club
address: 1514 E Harmony Rd Suite 4, Fort Collins, CO 80525
about: Skylark Indoor Golf Club is a members-only facility in Fort Collins, offering unlimited indoor golf access on three simulator bays. The venue uses top-tier Trackman iO technology, providing data-driven feedback for game improvement. Membership is required, with options at $240 per month or $2,640 per year, and members can book tee times up to 10 days in advance. The facility is designed for golfers seeking to play more, practice better, and join a community of fellow golf enthusiasts, operating daily from 6am to 10pm.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited access with membership-based pricing model
Advanced Trackman iO technology for precise swing analysis
Data-driven progress tracking through the Trackman Golf app
Access to 400+ global golf courses with realistic simulations

food_and_drink.notes: Members must bring their own food and drinks
BYOB policy - no on-site alcohol service

simulator_hardware.notes: Indoor Optimized radar system with OERT technology

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, Skylark does not offer rental clubs. Members must bring their own clubs to use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Members are allowed to bring their own food and drinks, with no on-site catering or bar service available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Busy golfers can complete 18 holes in approximately one hour per session.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, members can bring up to 3 guests per reservation, making it suitable for families with children.
